'''yathusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmaking|roadmaking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmaking|roadmaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yathusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæthisith|yæthisith]] || [[word:yæthisij|yæthisij]] || [[word:yæthisish|yæthisish]] || [[word:yæthisi|yæthisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yathuthusuth|yathuthusuth]] || [[word:yathuthusuj|yathuthusuj]] || [[word:yathuthusush|yathuthusush]] || [[word:yathuthusu|yathuthusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yathusuth|yathusuth]] || [[word:yathusuj|yathusuj]] || [[word:yathusush|yathusush]] || [[word:yathusu|yathusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yathufsuth|yathufsuth]] || [[word:yathufsuj|yathufsuj]] || [[word:yathufsush|yathufsush]] || [[word:yathufsuf|yathufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yathusuthu|yathusuthu]] || [[word:yathusuju|yathusuju]] || [[word:yathusushu|yathusushu]] || [[word:yathusuku|yathusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yathusuth|yathusuth]] || [[word:yathusuj|yathusuj]] || [[word:yathusush|yathusush]] || [[word:yathusu|yathusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yathusuthul|yathusuthul]] || [[word:yathusujul|yathusujul]] || [[word:yathusushul|yathusushul]] || [[word:yathusukul|yathusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yathusuthuthu|yathusuthuthu]] || [[word:yathusujuju|yathusujuju]] || [[word:yathusushushu|yathusushushu]] || [[word:yathusuku|yathusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yathusuthun|yathusuthun]] || [[word:yathusujun|yathusujun]] || [[word:yathusushun|yathusushun]] || [[word:yathusukun|yathusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yathusuthuoro|yathusuthuoro]] || [[word:yathusujuoro|yathusujuoro]] || [[word:yathusushuoro|yathusushuoro]] || [[word:yathusukuoro|yathusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
